title: AIP Key Declaration (v1)
description: External-publication references for operator + witness public keys (ADR-0043). Operator-supplied; AIP does not verify the references. Receptor cross-checks at least one reference against an independent source to close the key-to-identity binding.

witnesses.description: Witness key entries. May be empty.

fingerprint.description: SHA-256 hex (lowercase) of the DER SubjectPublicKeyInfo bytes of the public key. 64 hex chars.

iso8601UtcSeconds.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp with second precision and trailing 'Z' (no microseconds, no offset notation).

externalReference.description: One external publication channel for a key. Receptors cross-check the URI against the fingerprint by an independent route.

kind.description: Channel kind. Common values (open vocabulary): github_user_keys, https_pem, dns_txt, git_signing_key, verbal_in_person.

uri.description: Locator. Format depends on kind: URL, DNS name, git ref, etc.

note.description: Optional human-readable instructions (e.g. how to extract+compare the fingerprint from the channel).

operator_id.description: Operator identifier as used in the transparency manifest (e.g. 'jmm-evergreen'). Operator-supplied, not authenticated by itself.

external_references.description: May be empty; an empty list yields a visible 'no external references declared' warning in the report.
